originalDescription: Set up CodeRabbit for AI-powered code review. Create .coderabbit.yaml configuration file at the repo root with strict review profile (NOT chill). Configure path-based review instructions for apps/ and packages/. Add CodeRabbit as a required status check in branch protection. PRs must not merge until CodeRabbit review threads are resolved.

Configure path-based review instructions for apps/ and packages/. Add CodeRabbit as a required status check in branch protection. PRs must not merge until CodeRabbit review threads are resolved.
